sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24649" key="diagrammi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαγραμμ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n24649.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">divide by lines</tr_>: hence, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">play at chequers,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0487.tlg001:209" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">209</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
